overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy urban street in GTA V, starting on a sidewalk next to a Burger Shot billboard, crossing a busy multi-lane intersection with various vehicles including a bus and trucks, then continuing along the opposite sidewalk past commercial buildings and digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with concrete retaining wall and commercial billboard

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk next to a concrete wall, approaching an intersection

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving along the multi-lane road in the rain

entered.detail: gray concrete wall with horizontal construction joints topped with green hedge
dense green hedge vegetation on top of the retaining wall
large yellow billboard with 'Burger Shot' advertisement and burger image
tall white modern apartment building visible behind the hedge row
tall metal pole with traffic signals and illuminated street light

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a steady walk along a rain-soaked urban sidewalk bordered by a concrete retaining wall with hedges. The Burger Shot billboard is visible ahead, and the wet pavement reflects the overcast sky. Sparse traffic moves along the adjacent multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy multi-lane intersection crosswalk with heavy vehicle traffic

events.description: steps from sidewalk onto the striped crosswalk to cross the multi-lane road
city bus passes through the intersection from right to left
semi-truck and red van pass through the intersection ahead

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection through the marked crosswalk, navigating between lanes of traffic

notable_agents.action: city bus driving through the intersection, passing close to the crosswalk
large semi-truck with trailer moving through the intersection

entered.detail: white painted stripes on wet asphalt marking the pedestrian crossing area
tall beige building with multiple windows and balconies on the right side of the intersection
tall illuminated digital advertisement screen displaying a bottle image

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to the open intersection crosswalk where the camera crosses the multi-lane road. A large hotel building dominates the right side while various vehicles including a city bus and semi-truck pass through the intersection. The wet asphalt reflects the street lights and vehicle headlights in the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with commercial building facade and digital signage

events.description: steps onto the opposite sidewalk, leaving the crosswalk and continuing along the building front

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to a building with red decorative railing, passing street lights and approaching digital billboards

entered.detail: commercial building with cream-colored walls and red metal decorative railing along the sidewalk
bright yellow fire hydrant located on the sidewalk near the curb
tall street light pole with illuminated lamp casting light on the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the camera continues along the opposite sidewalk past a building with distinctive red railing. The digital billboard becomes more prominent on the right as the walk continues through the rainy urban environment, with street lights illuminating the wet concrete path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a rain-soaked urban street that transitions from a quiet sidewalk into a bustling city intersection. It begins with a steady movement along a wet pavement bordered by hedges and a concrete wall, heading toward a Burger Shot billboard under an overcast sky. As the camera reaches the edge of the road, the scene opens into a wide intersection where the camera crosses the asphalt amidst passing semi-trucks and a city bus, with the surrounding street lights and headlights reflecting off the rain-slicked ground. The perspective then shifts back to a sidewalk on the opposite side, passing a building with red railings before moving toward a prominent digital billboard that illuminates the rainy urban environment.
